note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë reviews cryptic messages from Mateo, sensing a trap in his request for an urgent meeting. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Zoë tries to get Mateo on board with her theory about Marina Ríos' murder. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Zoë frantically searches for any mention of Dr. Baeza's research online. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Zoë tries to shake off the feeling of being watched while hacking into Robledo's security system. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on Robledo's biometric data, fuelling her growing suspicion. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Zoë confronts Mateo about the inconsistencies in Dr. Baeza's research, sensing a hidden agenda. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Zoë confronts Mateo about the inconsistencies in Dr. Baeza's research, sensing a hidden agenda. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Zoë discovers a cryptic message on Mateo's computer, hinting at an imminent catastrophe. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Zoë discovers Mateo's secret research on Dr. Baeza's encrypted files. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Zoë and Mateo analyze the cryptic message from Dr. Baeza, their theories diverging. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Zoë confronts Mateo about his suspicious behavior and possible involvement in the lab sabotage. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Zoë tries to piece together the evidence, but inconsistencies nag her. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on Dr. Baeza's project Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Zoë discovers Mateo's hidden research on Dr. Baeza's project, sparking a growing sense of dread. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Zoë's research yields a disturbing connection between the murders and an obscure neuroscience paper. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Robledo Recon") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
